title: Fixing CI Hurdles: Component Testing Stalled

topics.title: Dependency Updates
topics.summary: Recent updates to dependencies, including Playwright and knip, have been merged to enhance functionality and fix issues. The Playwright upgrade addressed CI hanging problems, while knip's update introduced stricter error handling for unused configurations, promoting cleaner code practices.

topics.title: Component Testing Issues
topics.summary: A closed issue regarding component tests being stuck on the 'Install Browser' step highlights ongoing challenges in the CI process. The resolution of this issue is crucial for maintaining the reliability of automated testing workflows.

topics.title: UI Enhancements
topics.summary: A fix was implemented to resolve a z-index issue that caused the 'connect' dropdown to be obscured by a banner. This improvement enhances user experience by ensuring all UI elements are accessible and properly displayed.

topics.title: Documentation Improvements
topics.summary: Merging of a PR to update outdated feature documentation reflects the need for accurate and current information within the project. This ensures that users and contributors have access to the latest features and functionalities.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: Community contributions are being celebrated, with users expressing their positive experiences in contributing to the npmx project. This highlights the supportive environment fostered within the community, encouraging further participation.
